title: Up My Sleeve
description:
Add 3 [gold]Shivs[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Reduce this card's cost by 1.
upgraded_description:
Add 4 [gold]Shivs[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Reduce this card's cost by 1.
notes: This card's cost is permanently reduced by 1 each time it's played during a combat. The cost reduction is applied via EnergyCost.AddThisCombat().
